variants: Sophie Niewiadomski is a dedicated scholar in harmonic studies, holding the prestigious Jade Harmonicist Accreditation. Her academic journey was significantly influenced by her mentor, Fredrika Sjoqvist, under whose guidance she thrived. Additionally, Sophie takes an active role in her community as the Diversity Officer at Meadowgate Forum, where she advocates for inclusivity and equity.
